title: Yearly Aggregate
description:
The following table shows the sales (in thousands of units) of four mobile phone brands over four years:

| Year | Brand A | Brand B | Brand C | Brand D |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| 2021 | 120     | 80      | 150     | 90      |
| 2022 | 140     | 95      | 160     | 110     |
| 2023 | 130     | 110     | 180     | 120     |
| 2024 | 160     | 130     | 200     | 140     |

What are the total sales of all brands combined in the year 2022?
explanation:
Total sales in 2022 = Sales of (Brand A + Brand B + Brand C + Brand D)
= 140 + 95 + 160 + 110
= 505 (in thousands) = 505k units.

title: Multi-Year Average
description:
The following table shows the sales (in thousands of units) of four mobile phone brands over four years:

| Year | Brand A | Brand B | Brand C | Brand D |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| 2021 | 120     | 80      | 150     | 90      |
| 2022 | 140     | 95      | 160     | 110     |
| 2023 | 130     | 110     | 180     | 120     |
| 2024 | 160     | 130     | 200     | 140     |

What are the average annual sales of Brand B over the four-year period?
explanation:
Sales of Brand B over 4 years:
2021 = 80
2022 = 95
2023 = 110
2024 = 130
Total sales = 80 + 95 + 110 + 130 = 415
Average annual sales = 415 / 4 = 103.75 (in thousands) = 103.75k units.

title: Growth Comparison
description:
The following table shows the sales (in thousands of units) of four mobile phone brands over four years:

| Year | Brand A | Brand B | Brand C | Brand D |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| 2021 | 120     | 80      | 150     | 90      |
| 2022 | 140     | 95      | 160     | 110     |
| 2023 | 130     | 110     | 180     | 120     |
| 2024 | 160     | 130     | 200     | 140     |

Which brand registered the highest percentage increase in sales from 2021 to 2024?
explanation:
Let's calculate the percentage growth for each brand from 2021 to 2024:
- Brand A: Growth = (160 - 120) / 120 = 40 / 120 = 33.33%
- Brand B: Growth = (130 - 80) / 80 = 50 / 80 = 62.5%
- Brand C: Growth = (200 - 150) / 150 = 50 / 150 = 33.33%
- Brand D: Growth = (140 - 90) / 90 = 50 / 90 = 55.56%
Brand B has the highest percentage growth of 62.5%.

title: Cross-Year Ratios
description:
The following table shows the sales (in thousands of units) of four mobile phone brands over four years:

| Year | Brand A | Brand B | Brand C | Brand D |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| 2021 | 120     | 80      | 150     | 90      |
| 2022 | 140     | 95      | 160     | 110     |
| 2023 | 130     | 110     | 180     | 120     |
| 2024 | 160     | 130     | 200     | 140     |

What is the ratio of the combined sales of Brand A and Brand C in 2021 to the combined sales of Brand B and Brand D in 2024?
explanation:
Combined sales of A and C in 2021 = 120 + 150 = 270
Combined sales of B and D in 2024 = 130 + 140 = 270
Ratio = 270 : 270 = 1 : 1.

title: Trend Projection
description:
The following table shows the sales (in thousands of units) of four mobile phone brands over four years:

| Year | Brand A | Brand B | Brand C | Brand D |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| 2021 | 120     | 80      | 150     | 90      |
| 2022 | 140     | 95      | 160     | 110     |
| 2023 | 130     | 110     | 180     | 120     |
| 2024 | 160     | 130     | 200     | 140     |

If the percentage increase in the sales of Brand D from 2024 to 2025 is expected to be double the percentage increase from 2023 to 2024, what will be the projected sales of Brand D in 2025?
explanation:
1. Percentage increase for Brand D from 2023 to 2024 = [(140 - 120) / 120] * 100 = (20 / 120) * 100 = 16.67%.
2. Projected percentage increase from 2024 to 2025 = 2 * 16.67% = 33.33% (or exactly 2 * 1/6 = 1/3).
3. Projected sales of Brand D in 2025 = Sales in 2024 + 33.33% of Sales in 2024
= 140 + (1/3) * 140 = 140 + 46.67 = 186.67 (in thousands) = 186.67k units.
